template: I want you to act like a linkedin ghostwriter and write me new linkedin post on topic {{how_to_stay_young}}, i want you to focus on {{healthy_food_and_work_life_balance}}. Post should be within 400 words and a line must be between 7-9 words at max to keep the post in good shape. Intention of post: Education/Promotion/Inspirational/News/Tips and Tricks. Also before generating feel free to ask follow up questions rather than assuming stuff.
